meta.purpose: Full catalog of all 30 FBLA High School presentation events for the Vye Presentation Workbot. Each event lists tier, the input tools that apply, the grading ENGINES it needs, its deliverable, and its official rating sheet with a per-line engine tag. 'build_ready' events have exact, validated per-criterion rubrics in presentation_rubrics.json; the rest are artifact/interactive events whose graders (vision/video/code/web/live) are later phases.
meta.source: Virginia FBLA guideline PDFs (cteresource.org), reproducing the national 2025-26 rating sheets.

events.components: Prejudged report (PDF) + presentation
events.deliverable: Prejudged report (PDF) + presentation

Confidence, body language, eye contact, voice

events.notes: The captured line items sum to 140, but the official sheet prints a 150 total (one item's max is likely 10 higher than captured). grand_total is set to the honest computed 140; verify the missing 10 against the official PDF before locking.
